LanguageData.WULA_Missile.label: Missile
LanguageData.WULA_Missile.description: A weapon that fires homing projectiles, usually at a relatively low speed.
LanguageData.WULA_Psychic.label: Psychic
LanguageData.WULA_Psychic.description: A weapon that interacts with psychic energy.
LanguageData.WULA_SP_Melee_Weaopn.label: Special melee weapons
